questions.enonce: When reporting what someone said in the past, what usually happens to the tense?
options: It moves one step back into the past

questions.enonce: 'He said me that he was tired' is grammatically correct.
She said, 'I am happy' -> She said that she {{1}} happy.

pairs.right: Used with a direct object (me, him, etc.)

questions.enonce: Report this: 'I will help you', he said.
options: He said he will help me
He said he would help me
